Review this pull request against the base branch.

Rules:
- Review only the files listed in changed_files.txt
- Ignore formatting-only issues
- Ignore generated files, lockfiles, and snapshots
- Focus on correctness, security, maintainability, performance, and missing tests

Output format:
# Bob Review Summary

## High
- [file path] Issue
  - Why it matters
  - Suggested fix

## Medium
- [file path] Issue
  - Why it matters
  - Suggested fix

## Low
- [file path] Issue
  - Why it matters
  - Suggested fix

If there are no meaningful findings, output exactly:
No significant issues found.
